metadata.description: Vanko's personal Claude Code skills marketplace - a collection of AI development utilities.

plugins.name: task-driven-ai-dev
plugins.description: Turn a repository into a task-driven AI delivery loop with durable planning artifacts, guarded single-task execution, progress logging, and validation gates.

plugins.name: coding-workflow
plugins.description: A structured development workflow for fullstack projects with verification gates, persistent state, and browser testing integration.

plugins.name: interactive-learning
plugins.description: Interactive learning system based on Bloom's 2 Sigma Problem and mastery learning principles. Features dialog-based checkpoint verification, branch exploration, and progress tracking across conversations.
